name: Infisical
description: Monitor Infisical secrets management workspaces and member access for secrets hygiene compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. In Infisical, go to Organization Settings > Access Control > Identities
2. Create a Machine Identity with the 'Member' role
3. Under Authentication, configure Universal Auth
4. Note the Client ID and Client Secret
5. Obtain an access token: POST https://app.infisical.com/api/v1/auth/universal-auth/login with clientId and clientSecret
6. Paste the access token below

Note: Access tokens expire (default 30 days). You may need to refresh periodically.

checks.name: Secure Secrets
checks.description: Verifies Infisical projects are configured for secrets management

checks.name: Separation of Environments
checks.description: Verifies Infisical workspaces have environment separation configured
